eligibility: South Africans aged 18 or older who are a main member, spouse or adult dependant on Vitality Health and hold a qualifying Discovery Bank account with Vitality Money and a Discovery Miles Account.
region: South Africa / launch event in Johannesburg
verificationNote: Official Discovery competition page and Discovery Vitality PDF terms reviewed and approved for Freehub publication on 18 July 2026.
sourceReport: User-supplied Discovery Vitality promotion reviewed against the official Discovery competition page and PDF terms on 18 July 2026.
evidenceNotes: Official Discovery Vitality terms confirm the 24 June to 22 July 2026 period, qualifying Vitality Health and Discovery Bank/Vitality Money eligibility, the Exclusive Books online pre-order requirement, full or partial Discovery Miles payment, one entry per participant, a random draw for five winners and double tickets to the 11 August Johannesburg launch. Flights, accommodation and transport are included for winners who live outside Gauteng.
imageReviewNote: User-supplied official Discovery and Exclusive Books competition artwork selected on 18 July 2026.
